name: bill492--video-understanding
description: Analyze videos with Google Gemini multimodal AI. Download from any URL (Loom, YouTube, TikTok, Vimeo, Twitter/X, Instagram, 1000+ sites) and get transcripts, descriptions, and answers to questions. Use when asked to watch, analyze, summarize, or transcribe a video, or answer questions about video content. Triggers on video URLs or requests involving video understanding.
